description.value: Price 7,500 gp; Slot hands; CL 5th; Weight 1 lb.; Aura faint conjuration DESCRIPTION These gauntlets grant a +1 enhancement bonus on grapple checks. Each pair of gauntlets is created to fight a specific type or subtype of creature from the list of creature types in the bane weapon special ability. While the wearer is grappling a creature of the designated type, the gauntlets’ enhancement bonus increases by 2 and the wearer deals an additional 2d6 points of nonlethal damage when dealing damage as part of a successful grapple check. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 3,750 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells summon monster I
